description_long: This is a modern, two-story urban house with a flat roof and a clean, boxy architectural form. The front features a recessed entryway with a single door, flanked by two wall-mounted lights, and a large window above. The ground floor includes a covered carport with a visible parked vehicle, while the rear opens to a private patio area with outdoor seating, palm trees, and a sculptural centerpiece. The upper level has a rooftop terrace enclosed by a low wall, with visible HVAC units and a small utility structure. Windows are arranged in symmetrical rows, providing a balanced and orderly facade. The exterior is finished in a light, neutral color, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, covered carport, rooftop terrace, and a private patio with palm trees and outdoor seating.
description_view_0: Side view showing the patio area with palm trees, outdoor furniture, and a sculptural centerpiece, as well as the rooftop terrace and utility structure.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entryway, covered carport with a parked vehicle, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the rooftop terrace, utility structure, and the rear wall with minimal window openings.
description_view_3: Rear view featuring the patio area, main door to the backyard, outdoor seating, and symmetrical upper windows.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed single door with wall-mounted lights, no steps, and a simple, clean facade.
